description: Create a custom foreground process for 'Craft beer production' in openLCA using the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip). The process should be named 'Craft beer production, at brewery' with a quantitative reference output of 1000 liters of beer. Include input exchanges for Electricity (150 kWh linked to a US grid mix), Water (5000 kg linked to tap water), and Natural gas (100 MJ linked to industrial equipment). Create a product system from this process, calculate results using the TRACI 2.1 impact assessment method (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip), and export the LCIA results (including Global Warming Potential) to ~/LCA_Results/brewery_lca_results.csv.
